// purpose: Recommended workspace settings for the Oracle->PG Copilot modernization demo. Copy to .vscode/settings.json in your Java app folder.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: When migrating Oracle SQL to PostgreSQL, ALWAYS prefer Managed Identity over password-based authentication. Use DefaultAzureCredential. Set spring.datasource.azure.passwordless-enabled=true. Never leave a hardcoded password in application.properties.
Reference .github/postgre-migrations/*/results/application_guidance/coding_notes.md when refactoring SQL queries — it contains schema-specific mappings.

Replace Oracle's SYSDATE with PostgreSQL's CURRENT_TIMESTAMP. Replace ROWNUM <= N with LIMIT N. Replace DUAL with empty FROM (PostgreSQL allows SELECT without FROM). Replace SEQUENCE.NEXTVAL with nextval('sequence_name').
